The '''''Syren''''' was a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Trade Federation pleasure liner|pleasure liner]]. It was the primary vessel used by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Toat]] on [[Maramere]]. After killing Toat and stealing a prototype [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] from the vessel, [[Sol Sixxa]] sunk the ship.

==History==
The '''Syren''' was in the middle of a pleasure trip around the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of [[Maramere]]. It was hosted by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Toat]] who was talking to [[Harro Ruuk]] about the prototype [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] from [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]], as well the planet{{'s}} resources and it{{'s}} natives, the [[Mere]]. Suddenly Toat was shot dead by a Mere [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Mere Resistance|lead]] by [[Sol Sixxa]] and the ships{{'s}} [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s easily destroyed. Sixxa then proceeded to steal the prototype, threw all crew including Ruuk overboard and set [[Thermal detonator/Legends|Thermal charges]] to scuttle the ship.

The ship was then left at the bottom of the ocean. [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], who was hired by [[Loreli Ro]] to stop Sixxa, would swim to the wreckage, observing the damage to understand what Sixxa was armed with when he discovered [[PL-37]]{{'s}} head. He would retrieve it to find any information on Sixxa.

==Appearances==
*[[Starfighter: Crossbones 1|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Starfighter: Crossbones 2|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 2]] {{1stID|the ''Syren''}}
